entities.name: Service
entities.description: A core offering of the business, such as 3D letters, neon signs, or facade decoration.

entities.name: ProductPack
entities.description: Pre-packaged solutions targeted at specific business needs (e.g., Start Pack, Premium Pack).

entities.name: Segment
entities.description: A target audience category, such as cafes, clinics, or franchises.

entities.name: CaseStudy
entities.description: A portfolio project demonstrating a completed job.

entities.name: Calculator
entities.description: A pricing engine module to generate cost estimates based on parameters.

entities.name: Estimate
entities.description: The output of the calculator providing a price range and recommendations.

entities.name: AIAssistantSession
entities.description: An interactive chat session for gathering user requirements and providing automated recommendations.

entities.name: ClientAccount
entities.description: A future portal for clients to manage projects, estimates, and files.

flows.name: Visitor to Lead Conversion
steps: Visitor lands on Premium Homepage or Segment Page
Visitor views relevant Case Studies and Service details
Visitor uses Calculator (or AI Assistant) to get an estimate
Visitor submits Lead form with project details

flows.name: AI Assistant Consultation
steps: User interacts with AI Assistant (mocked for now)
Assistant asks diagnostic questions (business type, task)
Assistant recommends a Service or Product Pack
Assistant captures Lead info and hands off to manager
